title: The Hidden Dungeon Only I Can Enter
sourceNotes: Single 12-episode season (2021); episodes are non-cumulative. Based on Meguru Seto's light novel, but mapped against the Tomoyuki Hino manga (AniList id 103850), the source community guides use for episode-to-chapter tracking; the LN itself has no per-chapter numbering. The anime adapts manga chapters 1-38 (the end of Volume 5, the Phantom/Olivia arc), skipping a handful of chapters (12, 16, 24-25, 36) along the way, so ranges are approximate and volume-anchored. Manga complete at 111 chapters per AniList (Vol 1 = ch 1-7, Vol 2 = ch 8-14, Vol 3 = ch 15-22, Vol 4 ~ch 23-30, Vol 5 ~ch 31-38). Everything past ch 38 is unadapted. No theatrical films.
